description: Style Note Every woman needs a choice of kurtas in her wardrobe. The USP of w is a simple, elegant silhouette, coupled with modern design details. In this kurta we see the traditional garment in a new avatar with W's innovative styling. Wear this piece   with leggings and delicate sandals.  Product Details White kurta with blue floral print at the centre, has a round neck, chest button placket, short sleeves and a vented hem Material
